figures.caption: Table 1. Performance comparison on FashionIQ and CIRR relative to R@k(%). The overall best results are in bold, while the second-best results are underlined. The Avg metric in CIRR denotes (R@5 + Rsubset@1) / 2.
Table 2. Ablation study on FashionIQ and CIRR datasets. We compute Avg-R@10, Avg-R@50 for FashionIQ, and Avg (mean of R@5 and Rsubset@1) for CIRR, respectively.
Fig. 3. Case study on CIRR and FashionIQ.
Fig. 2. HINT framework: (a) Dual Context Extraction, (b) Quantification of Contextual Relevance, (c) Dual-Path Consistency Constraints.
